ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the player (e.g., TE, QB, K, RB, WR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "joined_team_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_notes" TEXT /* Any medical notes or conditions that need to be monitored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team (e.g., SD, PIT, IND) */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "team_training_facility" TEXT /* Name of the team's training facility */,
  "team_medical_staff" TEXT /* Names of the medical staff members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" INTEGER /* Type of injury (e.g., concussion, torn ACL) */,
  "game_status" INTEGER /* Status of the player's participation in the game (e.g., Day-to-Day, Out) */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_start_date" TEXT /* Date the recovery process began */,
  "recovery_end_date" TEXT /* Expected date the recovery process will end */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current status of recovery (e.g., In Progress, Recovered) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., Minor, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "injury_cause" TEXT /* Detailed cause of the injury */,
  "injury_treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_injury_type FOREIGN KEY ("injury_type") REFERENCES injury_types ("injury_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_week FOREIGN KEY ("week") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_game_status FOREIGN KEY ("game_status") REFERENCES game_statuses ("game_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season when the game was played */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss, Tie) */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_week FOREIGN KEY ("week") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the player played in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the game */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status during the game (e.g., Played, Substituted Out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_types" (
  "injury_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury type */,
  "injury_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the injury type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury type */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Average recovery time for the injury type in days */,
  "common_causes" TEXT /* Common causes of the injury type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statuses" (
  "game_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game status */,
  "game_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the game status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game status */,
  "recovery_recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended recovery actions for the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_requirements" TEXT /* Physical and skill requirements for the position */,
  "common_injuries" TEXT /* Common injuries associated with the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Number of the week */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, trainer, medical staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., Read-Only, Full Access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player information */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_versions" (
  "player_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player version */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Update, Create) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_versions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_reports" (
  "injury_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* ID of the injury */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury report */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Name of the doctor who reported the injury */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital where the injury was treated */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_reports_injury_id FOREIGN KEY ("injury_id") REFERENCES injuries ("injury_id")
)
